prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年山东省综合类最低录取位次分别为约26402名→28185名→39613名→49414名→38477名。2023年位次大幅后移至39613名，2024年继续后移至49414名创近年新低，2025年明显回升至38477名，近两年波动剧烈，2025年基准位次约38477名；该校在山东省综合类招生计划：2021年273人→2022年263人→2023年258人→2024年282人→2025年278人→2026年277人。2026年计划较2025年微幅减少1人，基本持平，对竞争格局影响极小。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 西南交通大学为211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名近年分别为：2021年第51名、2022年第52名、2023年第55名、2024年第59名、2025年第52名、2026年第49名，2026年排名回升至前50，整体处于全国中上游水平；2023年声誉评价为中性/混合，有考生因分数线波动被录取后对学校生活表示满意；2026年声誉数据中未单独提及该校；抖音热度排名第94位，评价为"一般"，综合热度176307，短视频平台曝光度处于中低水平，未见明显报考热度异常信号。历史投档异常方面，2023年有低关注度记录（考生因分数线暴跌被录取），但未形成持续负面舆情；第五轮学科评估中，交通运输工程获评A+（全国顶尖），土木工程获评A（国内一流），两大王牌学科与该校轨道交通、土木类专业高度对应，对相关方向考生有较强吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类热度从2023年高热推荐降温至2024年推荐，电子信息/通信、电气工程及其自动化持续高热推荐；土木建筑从明显劝退转为分化观望。山东省2026年高考报名总数约72万人，较2025年约68.1万人增加约3.9万人（增幅约5.7%），考生规模扩大使整体录取竞争加剧；西南交通大学位于四川省成都市，在山东省属跨省招生，2025年招生计划278人占该校总计划一定比例，无特殊地域偏好信号。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次38477名、2026年招生计划微幅缩招1人、山东省考生总数增加约5.7%带来的竞争加剧、学校软科排名回升至第49名的正面影响，以及声誉热度平稳等因素，预计2026年最低录取位次在38394名基础上小幅后移。预测最低位次约38894名，区间38394–39394名。

major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 预测位次约38894名，区间38394–39394名。建议位次在38000名以内的考生可将一档专业（计算机类、电气工程及其自动化、电子信息类）作为冲刺目标；位次在38500–39500名 之间的考生以二档专业（交通运输类、法学、数学等）为主力选择，兼顾学校王牌学科优势；位次在39500名以后的考生可重点考虑三档专业（土木工程A学科、材料类、测绘类等 ），利用该校行业特色实现稳妥录取。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum admission rankings for the Comprehensive category in Shandong Province were approximately 26402 → 28185 → 39613 → 49414 → 38477. In 2023, the ranking significantly dropped to 39613, and in 2024 it further dropped to 49414, hitting a recent low. In 2025, it rebounded to 38477, showing drastic fluctuations in the past two years, with a baseline ranking of approximately 38477 in 2025. The enrollment plan for this university in Shandong Province's Comprehensive category: 2021: 273 → 2022: 263 → 2023: 258 → 2024: 282 → 2025: 278 → 2026: 277. The 2026 plan is slightly reduced by 1 person compared to 2025, essentially unchanged, with minimal impact on the competitive landscape.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Southwest Jiaotong University is a 211 Project and Double First-Class university. Its recent rankings in the Soft Science China University Rankings: 2021: 51st, 2022: 52nd, 2023: 55th, 2024: 59th, 2025: 52nd, 2026: 49th. In 2026, the ranking rebounded to the top 50, overall at the mid-to-upper level nationally. In 2023, the reputation evaluation was neutral/mixed, with some candidates expressing satisfaction with campus life after being admitted due to fluctuating admission scores. In 2026, the university was not separately mentioned in reputation data. Its Douyin popularity ranking is 94th, rated as "average," with a comprehensive popularity of 176307, indicating low-to-medium exposure on short video platforms and no obvious abnormal signals in application popularity. In terms of historical admission anomalies, there was a record of low attention in 2023 (candidates admitted due to a sharp drop in admission scores), but no sustained negative public opinion. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Transportation Engineering was rated A+ (top in the country), and Civil Engineering was rated A (first-class domestically). These two top disciplines closely correspond to the university's rail transit and civil engineering majors, strongly attracting candidates in related fields.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Computer-related majors cooled from high-heat recommendation in 2023 to recommendation in 2024; Electronics/Communications, Electrical Engineering and Automation continued to be highly recommended; Civil Engineering shifted from obvious discouragement to divided observation. In 2026, the total number of Gaokao registrants in Shandong Province is approximately 720,000, an increase of about 39,000 (approximately 5.7%) compared to about 681,000 in 2025. The expansion of the candidate pool intensifies overall admission competition. Southwest Jiaotong University is located in Chengdu, Sichuan Province, and recruits across provinces in Shandong. In 2025, the enrollment plan of 278 people accounts for a certain proportion of the university's total plan, with no special regional preference signals.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the baseline ranking of 38477 in 2025, a slight reduction of 1 person in the 2026 enrollment plan, intensified competition due to a 5.7% increase in the total number of candidates in Shandong Province, the positive impact of the university's Soft Science ranking rebounding to 49th, and stable reputation and popularity, it is predicted that the minimum admission ranking in 2026 will slightly shift backward from 38394. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 38894, with a range of 38394–39394.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Predicted ranking approximately 38894, range 38394–39394. Candidates with rankings within 38000 are advised to target Tier 1 majors (Computer-related, Electrical Engineering and Automation, Electronics and Information) as reach goals; candidates with rankings between 38500–39500 should focus on Tier 2 majors (Transportation-related, Law, Mathematics, etc.) as primary choices, leveraging the university's top disciplines; candidates with rankings above 39500 may consider Tier 3 majors (Civil Engineering A discipline, Materials-related, Surveying and Mapping-related, etc.) to achieve stable admission using the university's industry characteristics.
